name: Filet De Tofu with Apricot Dijon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds extra firm tofu, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan. Add onion and garlic. Cook until onions are translucent.
2. Gradually add tamari, mustard, orange juice, and apricot puree to the pan with onions and garlic. Stir continuously until all ingredients are well combined and the mixture is smooth.
3. In a separate pan, heat a bit of oil over medium heat. Add tofu slices in batches so they don't stick together. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
4. Transfer cooked tofu to the saucepan. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has reduced by half.
5. Divide tofu among serving dishes. Garnish with chopped scallions and dill.
6. Serve with stir-fried vegetables, rice, or a salad.
